folio.label: 126v
folio.l: So newefongel ben they , of here mete
And louen nouelries , of ¸pre kynde
No gentillesse of blod , ne may hem bynde
So ferde this Tercelet , allas that day
Thougú he were gentil born , & fressú & gay
And goodlicú for to sen , and humble and free
He sey vp on a tyme , a kyte flee
And sodeynly , he loued , this kyte so
That al his loue , is clene fro me a go
And hatú his trouthe I falsed , in this wyse
Thus hatú the kyte my loue , in hire seruyse
And I am born , witú outen remedie
And witú that word , this faucou~ gan to crie
And swougúned eft , in Canacees barm
¢ Gret was the sorwe , for the haukes harm
That Canacee , & alle hire wo~men made
They nyste how they mygúte , the faucon glade
But Canacee hom beretú hire , in hire lappe
And softly in plaistris , gan hire wrappe
There as she witú hire hook , had hurt hire selue
Now can nat Canacee , but herbes delue
Out of the ground , and make salues newe
Of herbes preciouse , and fyne of hewe
To helen witú this hauke , fro day to nygút
She dotú hire besynesse , witú al hire mygút
And by hire beddes hed , she mad a Mewe
And couered it , witú veluettes blewe
In signe of trouthe , that is in wo~men sene
And al witú oute the Mewe , is peynted grene
In whicú were peynted , alle theise false foules
As ben theise Tidifs , Tercellettes and Oules
Rigút for despit , were peynted hem be side
And Pies on hem , for to crie and chide
Thus lete I Canacee , hire hauke kepyngö
I wol no more as now , speke of hire Ryngö
Til it come eft to purpos , for to seyn
How that this faucon , gat hire loue a geyn
Repentaunt , as the story telletú vs
By mediaciou~ , of kambalus
The kynges sone , of whicú that I ©ow tolde
But hens fortú , I wol my processe holde
To speke of auentures , and of batailles
That neuäe ©et was herd , so greete mäuailles
First wol I telle ©ow , of Cambyuscan
That in his tyme , many a Citee wan
And after wol I speke , of Algerlif
How that he wan , Theodera to his wif

note.notetxt: 656last three crammed in. Notice size of writing.ODR
